notes: Address fields use env var tokens (${ALEO_ADDRESS}, ${WORKER_ADDRESS}). Never hardcode addresses in this file.
The run script substitutes tokens from env/secrets at runtime before validation. Portal injects addresses from authenticated session.
Suffix code 40 corresponds to STATE in pnw_name_registry.
Use only tier-1 employer registration path (10 USDCx base + fee_amount) during initial tests.
